chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4954 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "كُلُّ بِدْعَةٍ ضَلاَلَةٌ وَ كُلُّ ضَلاَلَةٍ سَبِيلُهَا إِلَى اَلنَّارِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4954 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Every innovation is misguidance, and every misguidance leads to the Fire."
